Home / Services / Garage Door Installation

Garage Door Installation

Expert garage door installation for Sacramento homes, tailored to your style and needs.

Choosing the right garage door is a significant decision for Sacramento homeowners. We offer a wide selection of styles, materials, and colors to complement your home's architecture, from classic raised-panel doors perfect for East Sacramento bungalows to modern flush designs ideal for Natomas new builds. Our installation process is meticulous. We start with a thorough assessment of your garage opening, ensuring proper measurements and alignment. We handle all aspects of the installation, including removing your old door, installing the new door and opener, and ensuring smooth, quiet operation. We also pay close attention to weatherstripping and insulation, crucial for Sacramento's hot summers and occasional winter flooding. We're experienced in working with the clay soil conditions common in the area, taking extra precautions to prevent future issues. We ensure your new garage door is not only beautiful but also durable and reliable for years to come. Our team will walk you through the operation and maintenance of your new door, ensuring you are completely satisfied with the installation.

Our Process

  1. 01 Initial Consultation & Selection
  2. 02 Precise Measurement & Preparation
  3. 03 Professional Installation & Alignment
  4. 04 Thorough Testing & Quality Check

Benefits

  • Enhanced Curb Appeal
  • Increased Home Value
  • Improved Security
  • Energy Efficiency

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does garage door installation take?

Typically, a standard garage door installation takes between 4-6 hours, depending on the complexity of the project and any necessary modifications to the opening.

What types of garage doors do you install?

We install a wide range of garage doors, including sectional doors, roll-up doors, carriage house doors, and custom-designed doors in various materials like steel, wood, aluminum, and composite.

Do you offer a warranty on your installation services?

Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on our installation services, covering both the labor and the materials used. Specific warranty details will be provided with your quote.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door installation? Contact us today.
